d: Solise enters a nature-attuned state, releasing [[3]] waves of healing across the battlefield that each restores [[140%]]<ATK> HP to affected allies. If an allied Bulbsprite is affected by one of her healing waves, it sends a water ring from its host's position, dealing [[30%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies. Solise becomes [[unaffected|uncontrol]] while casting this skill.
Increases healing to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing to [[200%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing to [[220%]]<ATK>.

When a battle starts, Solise sends a Bulb to each non-summoned ally, blessing them with nature's gift. These Bulbs provide [[40%]]<ATK> healing to their host every [[3]]s. Solise becomes [[unaffected|uncontrol]] while casting this skill.
During battle, each Bulb can store any excess healing its host receives. When this stored healing reaches [[600%]] of Solise's initial ATK, the Bulb blooms into a Bulbsprite. The Bulbsprite permanently increases its host's ATK by a value equal to [[15%]] of Solise's initial ATK. Even when Solise is defeated in battle, the effects from her Bulbs and Bulbsprites stay active. But they can't grow or respond to her anymore.
Increases the healing provided by a Bulb to [[60%]]<ATK>.
Increases the healing provided by a Bulb to [[80%]]<ATK>.
Increases the healing provided by a Bulb to [[100%]]<ATK>.

Solise infuses her magic into potions to help restore [[190%]]<ATK> HP to the weakest [[2]] allies. When Solise heals an ally who already has a Bulbsprite with them, her healing grants a permanent shield that absorbs [[250%]]<ATK> damage. The shield value cannot exceed [[900%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases healing to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Increases ATK by [[10%]] during battle. Gains an extra [[5%]] ATK when an allied Bulbsprite is present.
Increases ATK by [[12%]] during battle. Gains an extra [[8%]] ATK when an allied Bulbsprite is present.
Increases ATK by [[14%]] during battle. Gains an extra [[11%]] ATK when an allied Bulbsprite is present.

When a Bulb blooms into a Bulbsprite, it grants its host a permanent blessing, increasing their Phys & Magic DEF by a value equal to [[4%]] of Solise's initial ATK.
When the total excess healing a Bulbsprite's host receives reaches [[600%]] of Solise's initial ATK, the Bulbsprite permanently levels up, and its host gains ATK equal to [[7%]] of Solise's initial ATK. The Bulbsprite can be upgraded this way up to [[3]] times.
Once a Bulb blooms into a Bulbsprite, its host gains Phys & Magic DEF equal to [[6%]] of Solise's initial ATK.
After a Bulbsprite reaches its max level, it permanently increases its host's max HP by [[450%]] of Solise's initial ATK.
Once a Bulb blooms into a Bulbsprite, its host gains Phys & Magic DEF equal to [[8%]] of Solise's initial ATK.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: While Solise is casting Life's Embrace, damage dealt by Bulbsprite triggers extra damage equal to [[2%]] of the total excess healing it has stored during its Bulbsprite phase. The extra damage cannot exceed [[110%]] of Solise's initial ATK.
